pageDescription: Manage models, data sources, notifications, authentication, and import capabilities.
noItems: No configuration items in this category.
currentCategoryDescription: Manage system configuration for this category using the field cards below.

intelligentImport.title: Intelligent Import
intelligentImport.description: Extract stock codes from images, files, or clipboard and merge them into your watchlist.

llmChannel.title: LLM Channels & Models
llmChannel.description: Manage channel protocols, base URLs, API keys, primary models, and fallback models.

auth.sectionDescription: Manage administrator password authentication to protect your system configuration.

helper.no_password: No password has been set. Please set an initial administrator password before enabling authentication, and keep it safe.
helper.password_retained: The system has retained a previously set administrator password. Enter the current password to quickly re-enable authentication.
helper.enabled_disable: If the current login session is still valid, you can disable authentication directly; otherwise, enter the current administrator password.
helper.enabled_keep: Admin authentication is enabled. To update the password, use the "Change Password" section below.
helper.default: Admin authentication protects the web settings page and API endpoints from unauthorized access.

auth.currentPasswordHintRetained: Enter old password to reactivate authentication
auth.currentPasswordHintDisable: Identity verification may be required before disabling authentication

changePassword.sectionDescription: Update the current administrator login password. After a successful change, use the new password for subsequent logins.
changePassword.validationMinLength: New password must be at least 6 characters

categoryNav.heading: Categories
categoryNav.subheading: Browse system settings and authentication by module.

field.sensitiveHint: Sensitive content is hidden by default. Click the eye icon to reveal.
field.sensitiveHintMulti: Multiple entries can be added or removed.

llmChannel.channelManagementDesc: Add provider channels, enter API Keys and model names. Configuration is automatically synced to the .env file.

quickAdd.title: Quick Add Channel
quickAdd.subtitle: Select a provider preset, then create a configuration draft with one click.

channelList.heading: Channel List
channelList.emptyHint: Select a provider preset and click "Add Channel" to get started.

runtime.heading: Runtime Parameters
runtime.subheading: Primary model, Fallback, Vision, and Temperature are written directly to the runtime configuration.
runtime.temperatureHint: Controls output randomness. 0 = deterministic, 2 = maximum randomness. Recommended: 0.7.
runtime.fallbackHint: Fallback is only used when the primary model fails. The primary model is excluded from fallback.
runtime.noModelsHint: Add at least one enabled channel with models to see primary model / fallback / Vision options.
runtime.litellmConfigWarning: `LITELLM_CONFIG` is enabled. Primary model / fallback / Vision / Temperature are managed in the general fields below; only channel entries are saved here without overwriting YAML runtime selection.

validation.emptyName: Channel name cannot be empty and may only contain letters, numbers, or underscores.
validation.invalidPrimaryModel: The selected primary model is not in the enabled channels' model list. Please reselect.
validation.invalidAgentModel: The selected Agent primary model is not in the enabled channels' model list. Please reselect.
validation.invalidFallbackModel: One or more fallback models are invalid. Please reselect.
validation.invalidVisionModel: The selected Vision model is not in the enabled channels' model list. Please reselect.

import.supportTitle: Supports images, CSV/Excel files, and clipboard text
import.supportDesc: Image recognition requires a Vision model to be configured. Review results before merging into watchlist.
import.reviewWarning: Review each item before merging. High confidence items are pre-selected; medium/low confidence requires manual confirmation.

errors.imageFormat: Only JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF images are supported
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests, please try again later
errors.timeout: Request timed out, please check your network
errors.mergeConflict: Configuration updated. Click "Merge to Watchlist" again to proceed.
